name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m14163 Black & Colorful】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series Victorine wallet is small and exquisite. The colorful Monogram pattern reinterprets the classic logo with the famous rainbow tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The wallet is made of coated canvas, featuring a refined calfskin lining and silver hardware, with a zippered coin pocket and multiple compartments inside for bills and business cards. 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
